recommendations.title: CODA
recommendations.overview: As a CODA (Child of Deaf Adults), Ruby is the only hearing person in her deaf family. When the family's fishing business is threatened, Ruby finds herself torn between pursuing her love of music and her fear of abandoning her parents.

recommendations.title: Jane Austen Wrecked My Life
recommendations.overview: An aspiring author looking to get more out of life takes up a writing residency and finds herself in the sort of romantic entanglements that could come from the pages of a Jane Austen novel.

recommendations.title: Christmas As Usual
recommendations.overview: To celebrate their engagement, Thea takes Jashan home — but his Indian roots and her family's Norwegian traditions clash in a chaotic Christmas.

recommendations.overview: A mysterious girl inspires a struggling artist.
